alerts.title: Iran launches coordinated drone and missile attack on Strait of Hormuz; US intercepts multiple weapons
alerts.summary: Iran fired drones toward Strait of Hormuz with US military confirming interception of at least 4 unmanned systems per incidents feed. Attack follows escalation pattern; Trump administration claims Iran retains only 21-22% of missile stockpile post-US strikes. Incident represents direct Iranian action against US naval presence in critical chokepoint.

alerts.title: Iran's uranium enrichment remains at 60% U-235; breakout window estimated 1-2 weeks
alerts.summary: IAEA reports Iran maintains 60% uranium enrichment with ~1-2 week breakout timeline per global_metrics nuclear headlines. Multiple sources (Reuters, JNS, NYT) confirm inspectors unable to verify enriched uranium stockpile since conflict began, creating critical verification gap. Nuclear program acceleration during active hostilities poses imminent proliferation risk.

alerts.title: Iran attacks Kuwait airport; one killed, 63 injured in regional escalation
alerts.summary: Iran reportedly launched attack on Kuwait airport with one fatality and 63 wounded per incidents feed (CBS News, Guardian, NYT sources). Incident marks direct Iranian strike on Gulf state infrastructure outside primary conflict zone and signals willingness to target broader regional allies during ceasefire negotiations.

alerts.title: Israel maintains strikes despite Lebanon ceasefire; Hezbollah rejects deal, tensions escalate
alerts.summary: Multiple incidents reports confirm Israeli strikes killing 9+ in Lebanon and reaching Beirut outskirts despite US-brokered ceasefire agreement. Hezbollah formally rejects Israel-Lebanon accord per NYT source; Iran declares support for Hezbollah as deal collapses. Ceasefire failure signals proxy escalation and weakening diplomatic architecture.

alerts.title: US negative sentiment surges to 57%; 'war' and 'strikes' keywords spike amid Iran-Israel tensions
alerts.summary: Sentiment analysis shows US negative sentiment at 57% (vs 35% positive) with 'war' appearing 11 times and 'strikes' 7 times in trending keywords. Trump dominates discourse (63 mentions) alongside Putin (15) and Ukraine (10), indicating public anxiety over multi-theater conflict escalation and potential US military involvement.

analysis_note: Iran accelerates nuclear enrichment and executes coordinated regional strikes while Israel-Lebanon ceasefire collapses and proxy forces reject diplomatic resolution; three-carrier US deployment and critical threat-level 9 rating reflect imminent escalation risk across multiple theaters.
